    // --- Slider and Profit Explorer UI Updates ---
    function updateSliderVisuals() {
        const slider = quantitySlider;
        const indicator = sliderValueIndicator;
        if (!slider || !indicator) return; // Ensure elements exist

        const value = parseInt(slider.value);
        const min = parseInt(slider.min);
        const max = parseInt(slider.max);

        indicator.textContent = `${t('qty')}: ${value}`; // Update indicator text

        // Calculate percentage for positioning indicator and track fill
        const percent = (max - min) > 0 ? (value - min) / (max - min) : 0;
        
        // Position indicator centered under the thumb
        const sliderWidth = slider.offsetWidth;
        const thumbWidth = 18; // Approximate thumb width (matches CSS)
        const thumbCenter = percent * (sliderWidth - thumbWidth) + (thumbWidth / 2);
        indicator.style.left = `${thumbCenter}px`;

        // Update slider track background fill
        const fillPercent = percent * 100;
        slider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, #444444 ${fillPercent}%, #ECECEC ${fillPercent}%)`;
    }

    function updateProfitExplorer() {
        updateSliderVisuals(); // Update slider's own visuals first

        const selectedQuantity = parseInt(quantitySlider.value);
        explorerQuantityDisplay.textContent = selectedQuantity; // Update quantity display

        const labCost = getLabCost();
        // Get actual handling fee (0 if not enabled)
        const actualHandlingFeeAmount = enableHandlingFeeCheckbox.checked ? parseCurrency(handlingFeeAmountInput.value) : 0;

        // Get current tiers from the table for price calculation
        const currentTiers = Array.from(tierRowsContainer.querySelectorAll('tr')).map(row => {
            return {
                qtyFrom: row.querySelector('.tier-qty-from').value,
                qtyTo: row.querySelector('.tier-qty-to').value,
                unitPrice: parseCurrency(row.querySelector('.tier-unit-price').value)
            };
        });

        // 1. Calculate price based on tiers/gallery BEFORE adding handling fee.
        const rawPriceBeforeFee = calculatePriceBasedOnQuantityAndTiers(selectedQuantity, currentTiers);
        
        // 2. Calculate the effective unit price based on the raw price.
        let effectiveUnitPrice = 0;
        if (selectedQuantity > 0) {
            effectiveUnitPrice = rawPriceBeforeFee / selectedQuantity; // Use raw price
        } else if (currentTiers.length > 0) {
            // Fallback for quantity 0
            effectiveUnitPrice = getUnitPriceForQuantity(1, currentTiers); 
        }

        // 3. Calculate total revenue by adding the handling fee to the raw price.
        let totalRevenueSelected = rawPriceBeforeFee;
        if (actualHandlingFeeAmount > 0 && selectedQuantity > 0) {
            totalRevenueSelected += actualHandlingFeeAmount;
        }
        
        explorerUnitPriceDisplay.textContent = formatCurrencyNumeric(effectiveUnitPrice); // Correct unit price
        explorerTotalRevenueDisplay.textContent = formatCurrencyNumeric(totalRevenueSelected); // Correct total price

        
        const totalLabCostSelected = labCost * selectedQuantity;
        const totalProfitSelected = totalRevenueSelected - totalLabCostSelected;
        
        explorerTotalLabCostDisplay.textContent = formatCurrencyNumeric(totalLabCostSelected);
        explorerTotalProfitDisplay.textContent = formatCurrencyNumeric(totalProfitSelected);
        explorerTotalProfitDisplay.style.color = totalProfitSelected <= 0 ? 'red' : '#444444'; // Red for negative or zero profit

        // Calculate discount percentage relative to base price (first tier's price)
        let discountPercentage = 0;
        if (selectedQuantity > 0 && basePriceForDiscountCalculation > 0) {
            const originalItemPriceForQty = basePriceForDiscountCalculation * selectedQuantity;
            // Reference price includes handling fee if applicable
            const fullReferencePrice = originalItemPriceForQty + (actualHandlingFeeAmount > 0 ? actualHandlingFeeAmount : 0);
            
            if (fullReferencePrice > 0 && totalRevenueSelected < fullReferencePrice && totalRevenueSelected > 0) {  
                discountPercentage = ((fullReferencePrice - totalRevenueSelected) / fullReferencePrice) * 100;
            }
        }
        explorerDiscountPercentageDisplay.textContent = discountPercentage.toFixed(1) + '%';
        
        // --- Update Chart Data ---
        const totalPricePoints = []; // Data points for price line
        const profitPoints = [];   // Data points for profit line
        const maxQtyForChart = parseInt(quantitySlider.max); // Use slider's max for chart range
        let yAxisMax = 0; // To dynamically set y-axis max for better visualization

        // Generate data points for the chart up to maxQtyForChart
        for (let q = 1; q <= maxQtyForChart; q++) {
            const itemPrice = calculatePriceBasedOnQuantityAndTiers(q, currentTiers);
            let totalRevenue = itemPrice;
            if (actualHandlingFeeAmount > 0) {
                totalRevenue += actualHandlingFeeAmount;
            }
            
            totalPricePoints.push({x: q, y: totalRevenue});
            
            const profit = totalRevenue - (labCost * q);
            profitPoints.push({x: q, y: profit});
            
            if (totalRevenue > yAxisMax) yAxisMax = totalRevenue; // Track max revenue for y-axis scaling
        }

        if (profitLineChartInstance) { // If chart is initialized
            profitLineChartInstance.data.datasets[0].data = totalPricePoints; // Update price data
            profitLineChartInstance.data.datasets[1].data = profitPoints; // Update profit data
            profitLineChartInstance.data.datasets[1].hidden = !currentHasCostSetting; // Show/hide profit line

            // Data for the vertical "selected quantity" line
            const yMinChart = profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.y.min !== undefined ? profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.y.min : 0;
            const yMaxChartValue = Math.max(yAxisMax * 1.1, 10); // Scale y-axis slightly above max data point

            profitLineChartInstance.data.datasets[2].data = [
                {x: selectedQuantity, y: yMinChart}, // Bottom of line
                {x: selectedQuantity, y: yMaxChartValue} // Top of line
            ];
            
            // Update chart scales and titles
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.x.max = maxQtyForChart;
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.y.max = yMaxChartValue;
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.y.title.text = `${t('Price')} (${currentCurrencySymbol})`; // Update currency in axis title

            // Ensure chart colors are consistent (might be needed if defaults change)
            profitLineChartInstance.options.plugins.legend.labels.color = '#444444';
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.x.title.color = '#444444';
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.x.ticks.color = '#444444';
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.y.title.color = '#444444';
            profitLineChartInstance.options.scales.y.ticks.color = '#444444';
            
            profitLineChartInstance.update('none'); // Update chart without animation
        }
    }


    // --- Event Listeners Setup ---
    // Add Tier button
    addTierButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
        let newQtyFrom = ""; // Default for new tier's QtyFrom
        const rows = tierRowsContainer.querySelectorAll('tr');
        if (rows.length > 0) { // If tiers exist, base new QtyFrom on last tier's QtyTo
            const lastRow = rows[rows.length - 1];
            const lastQtyToInput = lastRow.querySelector('.tier-qty-to');
            const lastQtyToVal = lastQtyToInput.value;
            if (lastQtyToVal !== t('infinite') && !isNaN(parseInt(lastQtyToVal))) {
                newQtyFrom = (parseInt(lastQtyToVal) + 1).toString(); // Next sequential number
            }
        }
        addTierRow(newQtyFrom, "", ""); // Add new row
        orchestrateTierUpdatesAndValidation(true); // Re-validate, suppressing errors for the new row
    });

    // Quantity Slider input
    quantitySlider.addEventListener('input', updateProfitExplorer);

    // Enable Full Gallery checkbox
    enableFullGalleryCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function() {
        fullGalleryFieldsDiv.classList.toggle('hidden', !this.checked); // Show/hide price input
        orchestrateTierUpdatesAndValidation(); // Re-validate and update UI
    });

    // Enable Handling Fee checkbox
    enableHandlingFeeCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function() {
        handlingFeeFieldsDiv.classList.toggle('hidden', !this.checked); // Show/hide amount input
        orchestrateTierUpdatesAndValidation(); // Re-validate and update UI
    });


    // --- Data Handling for Save/Apply ---
    function getPricingSettingsData() {
        const tiersData = [];
        Array.from(tierRowsContainer.querySelectorAll('tr')).forEach((row, index) => {
            tiersData.push({
                tier: index + 1,
                qtyFrom: row.querySelector('.tier-qty-from').value,
                qtyTo: row.querySelector('.tier-qty-to').value,
                unitPrice: parseCurrency(row.querySelector('.tier-unit-price').value),
            });
        });

        return {
            productName: mainProductNameSpan.textContent,
            labCost: getLabCost(),
            pricingMode: currentPricingMode,
            tiers: tiersData,
            fullGallery: {
                enabled: enableFullGalleryCheckbox.checked,
                price: enableFullGalleryCheckbox.checked ? parseCurrency(fullGalleryPriceInput.value) : 0
            },
            handlingFee: {
                enabled: enableHandlingFeeCheckbox.checked,
                amount: enableHandlingFeeCheckbox.checked ? parseCurrency(handlingFeeAmountInput.value) : 0
            },
            showFullGalleryOption: !fullGallerySection.classList.contains('hidden'), // Reflects visibility setting
            hasCost: currentHasCostSetting,
            currencySymbol: currentCurrencySymbol,
            currencyShortName: currentCurrencyShortName
        };
    }

    function applyPricingSettings(settingsData) {
        // Use the global handler if available
        if (window.myop_cta_handler) {
            window.myop_cta_handler('save_settings', settingsData);
        } else {
            console.log("Applying Pricing Settings (Mock):", settingsData);
        }
    }

    // Save Settings button click
    saveSettingsButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
        // Always run immediate full validation on save attempt
        if (orchestrateTierUpdatesAndValidation()) { // If form is valid
            const currentSettings = getPricingSettingsData();
            applyPricingSettings(currentSettings); // "Save" the data
        } else {
            console.error("Validation errors present. Cannot apply settings.");
            // Scroll to errors if visible, for better UX
            if (tierErrors.classList.contains('error-message-visible')) {
                 tierErrors.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
            }
        }
    });

    // --- Pricing Mode Toggle ---
    function updatePricingModeButtonText() {
        if (currentPricingMode === 'volume') {
            pricingModeToggleButton.textContent = t('switchToTieredPricing');
            if (titleCaptionSpan) titleCaptionSpan.textContent = t('volumePricing');
        } else { // 'tiered'
            pricingModeToggleButton.textContent = t('switchToVolumePricing');
            if (titleCaptionSpan) titleCaptionSpan.textContent = t('tieredPricing');
        }
    }

    // Pricing Mode Toggle button click
    if (pricingModeToggleButton) {
        pricingModeToggleButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Switch mode
            if (currentPricingMode === 'volume') {
                currentPricingMode = 'tiered';
            } else {
                currentPricingMode = 'volume';
            }
            console.log("Pricing mode switched to:", currentPricingMode);
            updatePricingModeButtonText(); // Update button/title text
            orchestrateTierUpdatesAndValidation(); // Re-calculate and update UI for new mode
        });
    }
    
    // --- Currency Tooltip Functions ---
    function updateCurrencySymbolTooltips() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.currency-symbol').forEach(span => {
            // Remove existing listeners to prevent duplicates
            span.removeEventListener('mouseenter', showCurrencyTooltip);  
            span.removeEventListener('mouseleave', hideCurrencyTooltip);
            // Add new listeners
            span.addEventListener('mouseenter', showCurrencyTooltip);
            span.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideCurrencyTooltip);
        });
    }

    function showCurrencyTooltip(event) {
        clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout); // Clear any existing timeout to hide
        tooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => { // Show tooltip after a short delay
            if (customTooltip) {
                customTooltip.textContent = currentCurrencyShortName; // Set tooltip text
                const rect = event.target.getBoundingClientRect(); // Get symbol position
                // Position tooltip below the symbol
                customTooltip.style.left = `${rect.left + window.scrollX}px`;
                customTooltip.style.top = `${rect.bottom + window.scrollY + 5}px`; // 5px offset
                customTooltip.style.display = 'block'; // Show tooltip
            }
        }, 500); // 500ms delay
    }

    function hideCurrencyTooltip() {
        clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout); // Clear show timeout if mouse leaves quickly
        if (customTooltip) {
            customTooltip.style.display = 'none'; // Hide tooltip
        }
    }
    
    // --- Initialization ---
    /**
     * Initializes the entire pricing setup UI with provided or default configuration.
     * @param {Object} config Optional configuration object to override defaults.
     */
    function initializePricingSetup(config = {}) {
        // Default settings
        const defaultConfig = {
            productName: "4x6 Fine Art Prints",
            labCost: 0.50,
            pricingMode: 'volume', // 'volume' or 'tiered'
            tiers: [ // Default tiers
                { qtyFrom: "1", unitPrice: "2.00" },
                { qtyFrom: "20", unitPrice: "1.75" },
                { qtyFrom: "50", unitPrice: "1.50" }
            ],
            showFullGalleryOption: true, // Whether the "Full Gallery" section is visible at all
            hasCost: true, // Whether the product has a lab cost
            fullGallery: {
                enabled: false,
                price: 0
            },
            handlingFee: {
                enabled: false,
                amount: 0
            },
            // Added Font Configuration to DTO
            font: {
                family: "\"Gotham Narrow SSm\", \"Gotham Narrow SSm A\", \"Gotham Narrow SSm B\", sans-serif",
                url: "https://pictimecloudaf-pub-g3csanfebyefg3dm.a02.azurefd.net/pictures/webfonts/701366/550D4A6EF889DED55.css"
            },
            currencySymbol: '$',
            currencyShortName: 'USD',
            learnMoreURL: 'http://help.pic-time.com/en/articles/7923112-how-do-i-set-up-tiered-pricing',
            lang: {
                volumePricing: "Volume Pricing:",
                tieredPricing: "Tiered Pricing:",
                switchToTieredPricing: "Switch to Tiered Pricing",
                switchToVolumePricing: "Switch to Volume Pricing",
                apply: "Apply",
                itemUnitCost: "Item unit cost:",
                qty: "Qty",
                qtyFrom: "Qty From",
                qtyTo: "Qty To",
                unitPrice: "Unit Price",
                unitProfit: "Unit Profit",
                infinite: "Infinite",
                addTier: "ADD TIER",
                remove: "Remove",
                addHandlingFee: "Add Handling Fee",
                handlingFeeAmount: "Handling Fee Amount:",
                setFullGalleryPrice: "Set full-gallery price",
                priceAllPhotos: "Price (all photos):",
                handlingFeeNotice: "A handling fee will also apply.",
                whatCustomersSee: "What customers see:",
                volumeDiscount: "Volume discount:",
                tieredDiscount: "Tiered discount:",
                perUnit: "per item",
                item: "item",
                items: "items",
                eachAddedItem: "each added item",
                fullGalleryFor: "All photos",
                handlingFee: "Handling fee",
                estimateProfit: "Slide to estimate your profit for each quantity",
                Quantity: "Quantity",
                Price: "Price",
                Profit: "Profit",
                cost: "Cost",
                discount: "Discount",
                tooltipVolume: "<strong>Volume Pricing</strong> (recommended): reach the next tier and all prints switch to the lower unit price, giving clients one clear discount.",
                tooltipTiered: "<strong>Tiered Pricing</strong>: each tier keeps its own rate, so the total is calculated from multiple unit prices.",
                learnMore: "Learn More",
                pricePlaceholder: "0.00",
                helperTooltipTitle: "About pricing modes",
                selectedQuantityLine: "Selected Quantity",
                errorInvalidQuantity: "Invalid quantity. Tiers must rise in sequence (e.g., 1-10, 11-20).",
                errorUnitPriceNegative: "Unit Price cannot be negative.",
                errorHandlingFeeNegative: "Handling Fee Amount cannot be negative when enabled.",
                warningPriceVsCost: "Warning: One or more Unit Prices are lower than the item cost.",
                warningGalleryPriceInconsistency: "Warning: The 'Full Gallery' price is reached before the start of your highest price tier. Consider adjusting prices for clarity.",
                warningGalleryPriceLower: "Warning: The 'Full Gallery' price is lower than the unit price.",
                itemPrice: "Item price",
                pricePerItemStr: '{price} {perItemText}',
                priceEachAddedStr: '{price} {eachAddedItemText}'
            }
        };

        // Merge provided config with defaults
        const settings = { ...defaultConfig, ...config };
        settings.fullGallery = { ...defaultConfig.fullGallery, ...(config.fullGallery || {}) };
        settings.handlingFee = { ...defaultConfig.handlingFee, ...(config.handlingFee || {}) };
        // Merge font settings
        settings.font = { ...defaultConfig.font, ...(config.font || {}) };
        
        settings.tiers = (config.tiers && Array.isArray(config.tiers)) ? config.tiers : defaultConfig.tiers;
        lang = { ...defaultConfig.lang, ...(config.lang || {}) }; // Update global lang

        // Apply global settings
        currentCurrencySymbol = settings.currencySymbol;
        currentCurrencyShortName = settings.currencyShortName;
        currentHasCostSetting = settings.hasCost;
        currentPricingMode = settings.pricingMode;
        
        // --- Apply Font Settings ---
        if (settings.font) {
            if (settings.font.url) {
                // Check if this stylesheet is already loaded to avoid duplicates (optional but good practice)
                if (!document.querySelector(`link[href="${settings.font.url}"]`)) {
                    const link = document.createElement('link');
                    link.rel = 'stylesheet';
                    link.href = settings.font.url;
                    document.head.appendChild(link);
                }
            }
            if (settings.font.family) {
                document.body.style.fontFamily = settings.font.family;
                // Note: Chart.js uses computed body font family in initializeProfitLineChart, 
                // so simply setting it on body here is sufficient.
            }
        }

        // --- Setup UI based on settings ---
        if(mainProductNameSpan) mainProductNameSpan.textContent = settings.productName;

        // Setup Lab Cost display
        if (fixedCostSection) {
            if (settings.hasCost) {
                fixedCostSection.classList.remove('hidden-visually');
                if (labCostValueSpan) labCostValueSpan.textContent = settings.labCost.toFixed(2);
                const costSymbol = fixedCostSection.querySelector('.currency-symbol');
                if (costSymbol) costSymbol.textContent = currentCurrencySymbol;
            } else {
                fixedCostSection.classList.add('hidden-visually'); // Hide if no cost
            }
        }

        const tieredPricingSectionElement = document.getElementById('tiered-pricing-section');  
        
        // Setup Handling Fee section
        if (handlingFeeSection) {
            if(enableHandlingFeeCheckbox) enableHandlingFeeCheckbox.checked = settings.handlingFee.enabled;
            if(handlingFeeAmountInput) {
                const hfPriceSymbol = handlingFeeAmountInput.previousElementSibling; // Get symbol span
                if (hfPriceSymbol && hfPriceSymbol.classList.contains('currency-symbol')) {
                    hfPriceSymbol.textContent = currentCurrencySymbol;
                }
                handlingFeeAmountInput.value = formatCurrencyNumeric(settings.handlingFee.amount);
                // Add listeners
                handlingFeeAmountInput.addEventListener('focus', handlePriceFocus);
                handlingFeeAmountInput.addEventListener('blur', handlePriceBlur);
                handlingFeeAmountInput.addEventListener('keydown', handleInputKeydown);
            }
            if(handlingFeeFieldsDiv && enableHandlingFeeCheckbox) handlingFeeFieldsDiv.classList.toggle('hidden', !settings.handlingFee.enabled);
        }
        
        // Setup Full Gallery section
        if (fullGallerySection) {
            if (settings.showFullGalleryOption) { // Check if section should be visible at all
                fullGallerySection.style.display = ''; // Show section
                if(enableFullGalleryCheckbox) enableFullGalleryCheckbox.checked = settings.fullGallery.enabled;
                if(fullGalleryPriceInput) {
                    const fgPriceSymbol = fullGalleryPriceInput.previousElementSibling; // Get symbol span
                    if (fgPriceSymbol && fgPriceSymbol.classList.contains('currency-symbol')) {
                        fgPriceSymbol.textContent = currentCurrencySymbol;
                    }
                    fullGalleryPriceInput.value = formatCurrencyNumeric(settings.fullGallery.price);
                    // Add listeners
                    fullGalleryPriceInput.addEventListener('focus', handlePriceFocus);
                    fullGalleryPriceInput.addEventListener('blur', handlePriceBlur);
                    fullGalleryPriceInput.addEventListener('keydown', handleInputKeydown);
                }
                if(fullGalleryFieldsDiv && enableFullGalleryCheckbox) fullGalleryFieldsDiv.classList.toggle('hidden', !settings.fullGallery.enabled);
            } else {
                fullGallerySection.style.display = 'none'; // Hide entire section
                // Ensure fields are reset if section is hidden
                if (enableFullGalleryCheckbox) enableFullGalleryCheckbox.checked = false;
                if (fullGalleryPriceInput) fullGalleryPriceInput.value = formatCurrencyNumeric(0);
                if (fullGalleryFieldsDiv) fullGalleryFieldsDiv.classList.add('hidden');
                if (fullGalleryHandlingFeeNotice) fullGalleryHandlingFeeNotice.classList.add('hidden');
            }
        }
        
        // Setup "Learn More" link
        const learnMoreLink = document.querySelector('#pricing_mode_tooltip .learn-more-link');
        if(learnMoreLink) {
            learnMoreLink.href = settings.learnMoreURL;
            if(settings.learnMoreURL && settings.learnMoreURL !== '#') {
                learnMoreLink.target = '_blank';
                learnMoreLink.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';
            }
        }
        
        // Adjust bottom borders...
        if (tieredPricingSectionElement) tieredPricingSectionElement.classList.remove('no-bottom-border');
        if (handlingFeeSection) handlingFeeSection.classList.remove('no-bottom-border');
        if (fullGallerySection) fullGallerySection.classList.remove('no-bottom-border');

        const isHandlingFeeSectionVisible = handlingFeeSection && handlingFeeSection.style.display !== 'none';
        const isFullGallerySectionVisible = settings.showFullGalleryOption && fullGallerySection && fullGallerySection.style.display !== 'none';

        if (tieredPricingSectionElement && !isHandlingFeeSectionVisible && !isFullGallerySectionVisible) {
            tieredPricingSectionElement.classList.add('no-bottom-border');
        } else if (handlingFeeSection && isHandlingFeeSectionVisible && !isFullGallerySectionVisible) {
            handlingFeeSection.classList.add('no-bottom-border');
        } else if (fullGallerySection && !isHandlingFeeSectionVisible && isFullGallerySectionVisible) {
            if (tieredPricingSectionElement) tieredPricingSectionElement.classList.remove('no-bottom-border');
            fullGallerySection.classList.add('no-bottom-border');
        } else if (fullGallerySection && isHandlingFeeSectionVisible && isFullGallerySectionVisible) {
            fullGallerySection.classList.add('no-bottom-border');
        }

        // Show/hide profit-related details in explorer based on 'hasCost'
        if(profitDetailTotalProfit) profitDetailTotalProfit.style.display = '';
        if(profitDetailLabCost) profitDetailLabCost.style.display = '';
        if(profitDetailDiscount) profitDetailDiscount.style.display = '';

        // Update all currency symbols on the page
        document.querySelectorAll('.currency-symbol').forEach(span => {
            span.textContent = currentCurrencySymbol;
        });

        // Populate tier rows from settings
        tierRowsContainer.innerHTML = '';
        if (settings.tiers && Array.isArray(settings.tiers)) {
            settings.tiers.forEach(tier => {
                const unitPriceForTier = (typeof tier.unitPrice === 'number' || typeof tier.unitPrice === 'string') ? tier.unitPrice : "";
                addTierRow(tier.qtyFrom || "", "", unitPriceForTier); // Add row for each tier in config
            });
        }
        
        applyTranslations(); // Apply all static translations
        refreshAllDynamicContent(); // Refresh all dynamic elements with new translations
    }

    // Setup with default config and render initial state
    window.myop_init_interface = function(config = {}) {
        initializePricingSetup(config);
        initializeProfitLineChart(); // Init chart once
        refreshAllDynamicContent(); // Ensure everything is updated with initial translations
        
        // Add event listeners for the pricing mode helper tooltip
        if (pricingModeHelperIcon && pricingModeTooltip) {
            pricingModeHelperIcon.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                event.stopPropagation();
                pricingModeTooltip.style.display = pricingModeTooltip.style.display === 'block' ? 'none' : 'block';
            });
            document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                if (pricingModeTooltip.style.display === 'block' && !pricingModeTooltip.contains(event.target) && event.target !== pricingModeHelperIcon) {
                    pricingModeTooltip.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        }
    }

    // Event listener for window resize to update slider visuals (e.g., indicator position)
    window.addEventListener('resize', updateSliderVisuals);

    // Initial call for standalone testing (optional)
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        // Mock Data for standalone testing
        const mockConfig = {
            productName: "4x6 Fine Art Prints",
            labCost: 0.50,
            pricingMode: 'volume',
            tiers: [
                { qtyFrom: "1", unitPrice: "2.00" },
                { qtyFrom: "20", unitPrice: "1.75" },
                { qtyFrom: "50", unitPrice: "1.50" }
            ],
            showFullGalleryOption: true,
            hasCost: true,
            fullGallery: {
                enabled: false,
                price: 0
            },
            handlingFee: {
                enabled: false,
                amount: 0
            },
            font: {
                 family: "\"Gotham Narrow SSm\", \"Gotham Narrow SSm A\", \"Gotham Narrow SSm B\", sans-serif",
                 url: "https://pictimecloudaf-pub-g3csanfebyefg3dm.a02.azurefd.net/pictures/webfonts/701602/550D4A6EF889DED55.css"
            },
            currencySymbol: '$',
            currencyShortName: 'USD',
            learnMoreURL: '#'
        };

        // If no config is passed externally immediately, we can init with defaults or wait.
        // For this file to work out of the box as a file, we call init with empty config.
        if(window.myop_init_interface) {
//             window.myop_init_interface(mockConfig);
        }
    });

    </script>
